---
name: Bug report
about: Something in RawDrop is broken or behaves unexpectedly
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What happens

A clear, one- or two-sentence description of the problem.

## Steps to reproduce

1. First step.
2. Then this.
3. And this is where it breaks.

## Expected

What you expected to happen.

## Actual

What actually happened. Include exact error text if any.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| RawDrop version | e.g. 0.3.8 |
| macOS | e.g. 14.5 |
| Hardware | e.g. M2 MacBook Air |
| Install source | download / build from source |
| Ollama | local / cloud / not running · model name |

## Logs / screenshots

```
Paste relevant Console output or a crash trace here.
```

RawDrop keeps process state in `~/Library/Application Support/RawDrop/` — attach `compile-state.json` if the issue is about compiling. Never paste API keys.

## Frequency & impact

- Happens: every time / sometimes / once
- Workaround: none / describe it
- Severity: blocks me / annoying / minor
